corrections.description: Article is misclassified as fiction from April 1967 page 3, but content is actually non-fiction about Relief Society Memorial from January 1967 pages 15-18
corrections.text: Content should be reclassified as non-fiction article about Relief Society Centennial Memorial Bell Tower from January 1967 issue, pages 15-18

corrections.description: The GOING UNAWARE poem by Pearle M. Olsen is completely missing from the article file - it contains the Danish Grandmother poem instead
corrections.text: The article file does not contain the GOING UNAWARE poem at all. It appears to contain content from a different article (Danish Grandmother poem by Julene J. Cushing). The entire file content needs to be replaced with the correct GOING UNAWARE poem.
